claims.claim: BridgeState tracks telemetry and sensory lanes plus fill, pressure trend, and safety status for reciprocity reporting.
Stale telemetry should transition to bidirectional_stale_telemetry after the stale window.
High-entropy pressure trend samples should expand and remain bounded rather than unboundedly accumulating during frequent telemetry.
Changing websocket cadence, stale windows, lock/update architecture, or live loop timing would be live bridge behavior.
evidence: authority_gate:Mike/operator approval required before live websocket cadence/stale-window/synchronization behavior changes
